text.message: black, how many vps do you have?
Yeah black has all the knights
i have 3 vp so i go to 9
can we put both of us at 9 and then we have some chance?
then we each have a chance if dice rolls
Its not cheating. It gives us both a chance.
Not handing you the win is cheating now? rofl
Heating is when you give out all your hand to one person
doing what maximizes your chance of winning is playing the game
